W m . f a . 238f^Tfar8-2-1991 ( 2 ) *T. 7-7/94^6«g^ffrlto23-2-1996 ( 3 ) tf, TR.3IT.140 («T)f^IFP 17-2-2000 ( 4 ) U "3PT.2fTT. 547 <3T) ftj'W 2 5 - 5 - 2 0 0 0 (5) *T. ^T.STT. 894 («T) ^IPP7-9-2001 ( 6 ) * t ^T.3TT. 32 ( 3 T ) f N ^ 10-1-2003 MINISTRY OF ENVIRONMENT AND FORESTS NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 26th May, 2003 S. 0.599(E).—hi exercise of the powers conferred by Section 15 of the Prevention of Cruelty to Animals Act, 1960 (59 of 1960), the Central Government, onthe advice of the Board, hereby makes the following amendment in the notification of the Government of India in the Ministry of Environment and Forests, SO. 32(E) dated 10-1-2003. In the said notification after serial No. 1 and the entries relat- ing thereto, the following serial number and entries shall be inserted, namely:— IA Additional Secretary (Animal Welfare) —Member Ministry of Environment & Forests, New Delhi-110003. fF.No.25/l/2003-AWD] RAJENDRAP.
